summary: Deliverable is **fundamentally incomplete** and fails core task requirements. Missing: (1) test harness script to run multiple test cases through `act`, capture output to `act-result.txt`, validate exact values; (2) test fixture files at `./fixtures/test-secrets.json` and test file at `./tests/SecretRotationValidator.Tests.ps1` (both referenced but not provided); (3) no evidence of red/green TDD workflow. Code quality issues: markdown formatting duplicates table-building logic 3×(lines ~105–184 in SecretRotationFunctions.ps1), magic date-format strings in multiple functions, hardcoded test dates in workflow suggest infrastructure belongs in external harness not here, no Set-StrictMode, `actions/checkout@v4` should be pinned to full SHA. Task explicitly requires "ALL TESTS MUST RUN THROUGH ACT" with test harness; this is missing entirely. Would not ship.
